category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a service-oriented programming language; official Jolie documentation says Jolie is designed for service and microservice development.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://www.jolie-lang.org/ uses the project name Jolie.
docs_sources: Official dedicated docs domain https://docs.jolie-lang.org/ is the primary documentation.
Official website documentation page links to the complete language and standard library docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/jolie/jolie; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Jolie as a service-oriented language for microservice development.
source_facts.description and executables identify Jolie as a language/toolchain.
